summary: Iteration 4 - verified all four requested UX fixes plus regressions. Backend pytest suite (13/13) passes. Frontend: (1) FloatingCTAs [data-testid='floating-ctas'] has exactly three children in order [fab-whatsapp, fab-sos, fab-idesign]; fab-idesign is initially collapsed (label absent), on first click it expands showing [data-testid='idesign-label'] with text 'Made by iDesign4u' and does NOT navigate; anchor href='https://idesign4u.in' target='_blank'; second click opens a popup to https://www.idesign4u.in/. (2) Mobile 390x844: hero-whatsapp-btn visible innerText='' (icon-only), hero-call-btn innerText='' (icon-only), hero-sos-btn innerText='SOS' (no 'Emergency SOS'); desktop 1280x800 shows full labels 'WhatsApp', 'Call Now', 'Emergency SOS'. (3) Service categories on mobile home use grid-cols-2: emergency top=1484, mechanical top=1484 (same row), electrical top=1707 (next row). /services page tiles use 'grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4'; first two tiles same top (931), third+fourth next row (1073). (4) Mobile Sheet menu opens with exactly ONE close button (Radix default sr-only 'Close' at top-right); custom duplicate X removed. Mobile menu bottom row: [data-testid='mobile-call'] and [data-testid='mobile-whatsapp'] both have innerText='' (icon-only circular buttons). Bottom-nav [data-testid='mobile-bottom-nav'] is visible and does NOT overlap floating-ctas (fabs bottom=748, nav top=759, ~11px gap). Regressions: phone '9281410305' present on /contact, absent on /; header logo loads (complete=true, naturalWidth=1536).
critical_code_review_comments: FloatingCTAs.jsx: auto-collapse timer (4000ms) restarts on every render triggered by state change - fine here, but note that clicking twice quickly within 4s to navigate depends on 'expanded' state persisting. Behaviour is correct but worth an inline comment for maintainability.

Home.jsx hero SOS anchor uses two siblings (md:hidden 'SOS' + hidden md:inline 'Emergency SOS'). Works well; using CSS to switch is fine but consider a single element with responsive text via SOSEmergency SOS — already implemented that way, good.
Consider optimizing /logo.png (2.3MB) - still a carry-over from iteration 3. Not blocking this iteration.

success_rate.frontend: 100% for all 13 criteria in the review request

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_-prefixed booking and contact records via existing test suite (no new seed data).
test_credentials: None required (no auth on this app)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 confirms all four UX fixes (round iDesign4u badge with collapsible pill below SOS FAB, mobile-shrunk hero buttons with icon-only WhatsApp/Call and 'SOS' text, mobile 2-col service grid on Home + /services, single X close in mobile Sheet). Official WhatsApp SVG (WhatsAppIcon.jsx) is used across hero, floating FAB, nav desktop, mobile menu bottom actions, and per code-review, on SOS/ServiceDetail/Contact/Footer. All regressions preserved: logo loads, phone '9281410305' scoped to /contact only, backend API pytest suite green. Non-blocking notes carried from iteration 3: 2.3MB /logo.png is oversized (also used for favicon).
rca of the issue: Not applicable - this iteration verified feature additions/UX polish, not a bug fix. First-click-expand-second-click-navigate behaviour on fab-idesign is achieved via onClick with e.preventDefault() when !expanded — verified working: first click sets expanded=true (label appears, still on /), second click follows the anchor href triggering a new-tab popup to https://idesign4u.in (Playwright expect_popup captured https://www.idesign4u.in/ after redirect).
